name: io.github.getpronto-io/mcp
description: MCP server for Get Pronto image hosting and transformation. Upload, transform, and manage images directly from AI agents like Claude Code and Cursor.

environmentVariables.name: GETPRONTO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Get Pronto secret API key. If omitted, use the generate_test_key tool to get an ephemeral key.

environmentVariables.name: GETPRONTO_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.getpronto.io/v1
